activeVisitRequiredDetail: Start an active visit before opening a voice consultation so any reviewed draft can be attached to that visit.
activeVisitRequiredForOpenmrsSave: Start an active visit before saving this draft to OpenMRS.
agentConnectedWaiting: Agent connected. Waiting for speech or draft data.
agentNotRespondingDetail: Start or restart the OpenMRS LiveKit agent for this room.
agentNotRespondingDetailWithDemo: Start the OpenMRS LiveKit agent for this room, or run the local demo flow while the room stays connected.
agentRoomLanguagesDetail: These values are written to LiveKit room metadata before the agent joins. They do not identify speakers automatically.
doctorSttDetail: Capture clinician speech and produce a local transcript.
draftAdminLoadFailed: Could not load draft write administration data.
draftAuditDetail: Recent draft queue/save/rejection events. Clinical draft text and transcripts are intentionally excluded.
draftConfigLoadFailed: Could not load draft write configuration.
draftReviewQueueOnlyDetail: OpenMRS encounter write is not configured or is still checking; this draft can stay in the review queue.
draftWriteHealthDetail: Encounter write requires configured encounter type, location, draft obs concept, and an active visit. Until then, drafts stay in review queue.
livekitConnectionHint: Check LiveKit reachability and gateway CSP connect-src for the LiveKit WebSocket URL.
llmAgentCapabilityDetail: Clinical drafting and tool calls are provided by the LiveKit agent.
llmHelperCapabilityDetail: Helper parser status for smoke tests and draft fallback.
localAiFlowPreviewDetail: The agent uses the selected languages to interpret the visit and prepare a clinician-reviewable OpenMRS draft.
localStorageHealthDetail: Draft and manifest files are owner-only
microphoneRoleDetail: Use Patient to simulate patient-side capture with one browser. Automatic doctor/patient diarization requires STT speaker IDs.
microphoneUnavailable: Microphone capture is unavailable in this browser context. Open the demo over HTTPS or localhost to enable clinical audio.
missingPatient: No patient context is available for this voice consultation.
noPatientContext: No active conditions, allergies, or medications on file.
openmrsDraftDetail: Compile an anonymized, clinician-reviewable encounter draft.
openmrsDraftWriteConfigurationDetail: Minimal validation for the encounter type, location, and draft obs concept used when a reviewed draft is saved to OpenMRS.
openmrsDraftWriteUnavailable: OpenMRS encounter write is not configured or is still checking. Queue the draft or try again after service health is healthy.
openmrsEncounterCreateFailed: OpenMRS did not create the encounter. The draft was kept in the review queue.
openmrsHealthDetail: Patient record and encounter write target
patientSttDetail: Capture patient response and transcribe it locally.
patientTtsDetail: Play the translated message using the local TTS voice.
roomLanguageMetadataDetail: The agent received these values before joining. Speaker attribution uses STT speaker IDs when available and falls back to the configured default role.
sttAgentCapabilityDetail: Speech-to-text is provided by the LiveKit agent, not the helper /stt endpoint.
sttHelperCapabilityDetail: Optional helper /stt endpoint for smoke tests.
tokenServerAuthDetail: Requires an authenticated OpenMRS session when enforced
tokenServerHint: Check that the token server is running and that gateway CSP allows this endpoint.
translateForDoctorDetail: Translate the patient response back to {{language}} for the clinician.
translateForPatientDetail: Redact identifiers and translate clinical meaning to {{language}} for the patient.
translationFlowActive: Local AI steps for doctor-patient interpretation and OpenMRS drafting.
translationFlowDescription: Open a local LiveKit room, then run the doctor-patient translation and OpenMRS draft flow from this workspace.
ttsAgentCapabilityDetail: Text-to-speech is provided by the LiveKit agent, not the helper /tts endpoint.
ttsHelperCapabilityDetail: Optional helper /tts endpoint for smoke tests.
voiceConsultationDescription: Start a LiveKit audio room for this patient.
